bullets: Assisting in the maintenance and monitoring of ship electrical power systems.
Working on navigation and communication equipment in accordance with vessel procedures.
Participating in preventive maintenance according to the PMS plan.
Diagnostics, servicing and maintenance of computer and network equipment.
Archiving and processing documentation in internal information systems.

experience.role: Skipper / Base Manager — full / part time
bullets: Operating speedboats and motor yachts up to 15 m in length.
Planning navigation routes along the Adriatic coast and islands.
Responsibility for crew and passenger safety; conducting safety procedures and briefings.
Managing the charter vessel base: rental coordination, vessel handovers.
Winter servicing and technical maintenance of more than 50 different boats.
Assisting with navigation and daily crew operations aboard a motor yacht.
Serving guests and working as part of a team in a hospitality and hotel environment.
Gaining practical knowledge of vessel technical maintenance tasks.

education.degree: University undergraduate study of Maritime Electrical and Information Technologies
education.note: Title: bacc. of Electrical Engineering and Informatics · University state swimming competition.

skills.title: Electrical Systems
items: Low-voltage and high-voltage ship electrical power systems
Generators, transformers, switchboards (MSB/ESB) and UPS systems
Electric drives and variable frequency drives (VFD)
Diagnostics and troubleshooting of ship electrical installations

skills.title: Navigation & Communication Equipment
items: GMDSS: VHF/MF/HF radio, EPIRB, SART, Inmarsat
ECDIS, GPS, AIS, radar (ARPA), gyrocompass, autopilot
Integration, calibration and servicing of navigation systems

skills.title: Automation & Control Systems
items: PLC systems and ship SCADA / IAS interfaces
Sensors, actuators and engine room monitoring panels
Ship networks and communication protocols (Modbus, NMEA 2000)

skills.title: Diagnostic Equipment & Tools
items: Multimeters, oscilloscopes, insulation testers, thermal imaging camera
Working with technical documentation: schematics, drawings, manuals (IEC standards)

skills.title: Safety & Regulations
items: Knowledge of SOLAS, MARPOL, ISM Code and MLC conventions
Conducting safety checks and preventive maintenance (PMS)
